# YellowMarket

> YellowMarket builds AI growth systems for local businesses and high-value professionals: AI-powered websites, AI chatbots and voice agents, lead automation, Google visibility, and growth content.

## Primary URL
- https://giteohub.github.io/yellowmarket/

## Contact
- Email: contact@yellowmarket.store
- Phone: +1 (202) 773-7868
- Entity: YellowMarket LLC, Wyoming, USA

## Services
- AI Websites: conversion-focused local business websites with schema markup, mobile-first layout, and fast loading.
- AI Chatbot & Voice Agent: 24/7 lead qualification, booking support, and common question handling.
- Lead Automation: missed-call text-back, automated follow-up, CRM integration, and SMS campaigns.
- Google Visibility: Google Business Profile optimization, local SEO, review generation, and service pages.
- Growth Content: weekly service pages, blog posts, and location pages written for customer search intent.

## Typical process
1. Free revenue leak audit.
2. Leak map ranked by likely impact and speed to fix.
3. Build and deploy the agreed systems.
4. Monitor calls, leads, bookings, and recovered revenue.

## Useful pages
- Homepage: https://giteohub.github.io/yellowmarket/
- Example client site: https://giteohub.github.io/yellowmarket/demos/client-demo/
- Trade business demo: https://giteohub.github.io/yellowmarket/demos/mz-plumbing-4-you/
